login.title: Sign In
login.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

setup2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication Required
setup2fa.subtitle: Your administrator requires all users to enable 2FA
setup2fa.description: Set up an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) to secure your account and access all Obli* applications.
setup2fa.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:

enrollment.selectLanguage: Choose your preferred language for all Obli* applications.
enrollment.notificationsHelp: Configure toast notifications across all Obli* applications.
enrollment.toastHelp: Show popup alerts when monitors change state, agents report issues, etc.
enrollment.bottomRightHelp: Toasts stack in the bottom-right corner. Less intrusive, ideal for dashboards.
enrollment.topCenterHelp: Toasts appear centered at the top. More visible, good for critical alerts.
enrollment.appearanceHelp: Choose your visual theme for all Obli* applications.

dashboard.title: My Apps
dashboard.noApps: No apps available. Contact your administrator.

account.title: My Account
account.toastHelp: Show popup notifications for status changes
account.bottomRightHelp: Toasts stack in the bottom-right corner. Less intrusive, ideal for dashboards.
account.topCenterHelp: Toasts appear centered at the top. More visible, good for critical alerts.
account.anonymousModeHelp: Hide sensitive data (hostnames, IPs, usernames) across all Obli* applications
account.noAppPrefs: No specific preferences for this app.
account.twoFactorActive: TOTP two-factor authentication is active. All Obli* apps are protected.
account.scanQrHelp: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
account.setup2faHelp: Add an extra layer of security. Once enabled, you'll need your authenticator app to sign in to all Obli* applications.

apps.title: Connected Apps
apps.apiKeyShown: API Key (shown once — copy it now)
apps.noApps: No connected apps yet. Click "Add App" to register one.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

groups.title: Permission Groups
groups.name: Name
groups.descriptionPlaceholder: Full admin access on all apps
groups.noTeamAccess: No team access — all teams are restricted by default
groups.appConnectionError: Could not connect to the app. Check that it is running and the API key is configured.
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group?

settings.title: Settings
settings.minPasswordLengthHelp: Enforced on user creation and password change
settings.force2faDescription: Require all users to set up 2FA. New users will configure it during enrollment, existing users on next login.
settings.smtpDescription: Configure an SMTP server to enable email-based 2FA (OTP by email). If not configured, only TOTP (authenticator app) is available.
